versions.author: sancho
versions.changes: Initial competitor intelligence: 3 direct (Snowball, Product Hackers, TheGrowtHacker), 4 indirect (iSocialWeb, Flat 101, Glissmarket, TEAM LEWIS). Battle cards + landscape map.

versions.author: sancho
versions.changes: Enriched with 3 deep dives (36 pages scraped total). TheGrowtHacker: cases are ex-employer work, 0 SEO. Snowball: Pau dual-role Voxel, BNI member. Product Hackers: 6M€ rev, AI Hackers vertical, Corti co-founder. Updated executive narrative, battle cards, landscape, cierre estratégico. TGH downgraded to Tier B.
